ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player currently plays for */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player's current contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player's current contract ends */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's current status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA, WNBA) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current head coach */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the referees officiating the game (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the game */,
  "assists_turnovers_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of assists to turnovers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP player for the season */,
  "all_star_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the All-Star game for the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds made per game in the season */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists made per game in the season */,
  "field_goals_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage in the season */,
  "three_pointers_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage in the season */,
  "free_throws_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage in the season */,
  "fouls_committed_per_game" REAL /* Average fouls committed per game */,
  "plus_minus_per_game" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds made per game in the season */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists made per game in the season */,
  "field_goals_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage in the season */,
  "three_pointers_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage in the season */,
  "free_throws_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage in the season */,
  "fouls_committed_per_game" REAL /* Average fouls committed per game */,
  "plus_minus_per_game" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating per game */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins in the season */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses in the season */,
  "playoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Playoff win percentage in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions (e.g., ["read", "write", "delete"]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the database was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the database was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
